_meta.description: Terrain-placing moves for Hex Battle Simulator. All moves have base_power 0 (no direct damage). Each places a terrain type on a set of tiles or as a global weather effect. Players must include at least one terrain move in their chosen 4-move set.

Electro Web.description: Electric web. AOE radius 1 (7 tiles). Deals 40 base damage AND places web terrain. Entering the web field applies -1 Speed stage. Requires line of sight.

Will-O-Wisp.description: Ghost fire scattered across the field. AOE radius 1 (7 tiles). Always hits. Places burn_zone terrain that deals 12.5% max HP per turn to any Pokémon standing on these tiles. Does not affect Fire-types. Requires line of sight.

Misty Terrain.description: Fairy mist envelops a wide area around the user. AOE radius 2 (19 tiles) centered on user. Any Pokémon standing on mist_zone tiles is immune to stat-stage drops from opponent terrain (slow_zone, poison_trap, resonance_zone). Does not block line of sight. Gardevoir's signature defensive terrain.

Toxic Spikes.description: Poisonous spikes scattered across the field. AOE radius 1 (7 tiles). Always hits. Bypasses barriers. Places poison_trap terrain. Any Pokémon standing on these tiles loses -1 Sp. Def stage per turn. Poison-types and Steel-types are immune. Gengar's signature field denial move — pairs with Hex for devastating chip damage.

Sunny Day.description: Intensifies the sun for 5 turns — global effect. Boosts Fire-type move damage by ×1.3. Weakens Water-type move damage by ×0.7. Charizard's signature terrain — dramatically increases Flamethrower's output. Cancelled by Rain Dance.

Rain Dance.description: Summons heavy rain for 5 turns — global effect. Weakens Fire-type move damage by ×0.7. Boosts Water-type move damage by ×1.3. Pikachu's terrain option — primarily used to counter Charizard's Sunny Day or deny Fire-type damage. Cancelled by Sunny Day.

Smokescreen Field.description: Dense smoke blankets the target area. AOE radius 1 (7 tiles). Always hits. Bypasses barriers. Places fog_zone terrain that blocks line of sight through those tiles. Ranged moves requiring LoS cannot fire through fog. Lucario's Aura Sphere is unaffected (bypasses LoS). Excellent for denying Thunderbolt and Flamethrower lanes.

Metal Sound Field.description: A horrible metallic screech resonates across the target area. AOE radius 1 (7 tiles). Always hits. Bypasses barriers. Places resonance_zone terrain. Any Pokémon ending their turn on these tiles loses -1 Sp. Def stage per turn. Lucario's signature setup move — drains opponent's Sp. Def to amplify Aura Sphere and Focus Blast damage.

Perish Trap.description: A death knell echoes across the target area. AOE radius 1 (7 tiles). Always hits. Bypasses barriers. Places perish_zone terrain. Any Pokémon that ends their turn on a perish tile begins a 3-turn countdown to fainting. Moving off the tile pauses but does not reset the countdown. Absol's signature high-pressure terrain — forces the opponent to reposition or faint.

Hail.description: Jagged hailstones pepper the target area. AOE radius 1 (7 tiles). Always hits. Bypasses barriers. Places ice_zone terrain. Any non-Ice-type Pokémon ending their turn on these tiles takes 6% of their max HP as chip damage each turn. Absol's passive attrition tool — combined with Perish Trap creates an inescapable zone of damage.
